plugins.name: claude-code-kit
plugins.description: Core toolkit: 33 agents + 3 skills for planning, development, review, and meta workflows.

plugins.description: Frontend agents and skills: React, Vue, UI/UX optimization, and E2E testing.

plugins.name: claude-code-kit-infra
plugins.description: Infrastructure agents and skills: Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD.

plugins.name: claude-code-kit-ops
plugins.description: Operations agents and skills: deploy, monitor, incident response, rollback, SLA tracking.

plugins.name: claude-code-kit-data
plugins.description: Data engineering agents and skills: database design, query optimization, migration.

plugins.name: claude-code-kit-integration
plugins.description: Integration agents: webhooks, Slack/Teams notifications, issue sync, CI/CD triggers.
